scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run prepare:site
scripts.cdk:deploy:dev: npm run build && DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT=dev npx cdk deploy "morara-dev/*" --require-approval never --app "node dist/infra/cdk/bin/app.js"
scripts.cdk:deploy:beta: npm run build && DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT=beta npx cdk deploy "morara-beta/*" --require-approval never --app "node dist/infra/cdk/bin/app.js"
scripts.cdk:deploy:production: npm run build && DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT=production npx cdk deploy "morara-production/*" --require-approval never --app "node dist/infra/cdk/bin/app.js"
